title: RL class 2 A
wikitext:
[]: RL class 2-A             Quote Post by Taumiel » Mon Mar 29, 2010 2:14 pm A picture's worth a thousand words, so... Another day at class 2-A: Welcoming the new transfer student: Walking back to the apartment: And, finally... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...when some people's OTP comes true: I guess you'll recognize the movie pretty soon... EDIT: the sudents' attire caught my attention, but I think that this film and Evangelion have other things in common. I'll elaborate later, if nobody does so first. (I hope the image links follow the board rules, I have linked them from my own photo...whatever; if that's wrong, please notify me)

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Mar 29, 2010 2:19 pm Next time on Rebuild: Shinji hallucinates time-traveling visits by Frank the rabbit, directing him to perform utterly pointless acts of vandalism. Also, fanservice.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Mon Mar 29, 2010 2:34 pm Why is black Hyuga in the classroom?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Mar 29, 2010 3:39 pm OK. It't getting a bit 4chan-ish in here, even for chit-chat, so if people could try to raise the discussion bar slightly, that would be great. I'm not seeing a huge amount of connection of Evangelion here. Very little in fact. I would suggest that just about any drama involving a classroom would provide the four pictures referenced here.

Article: RL class 2 A
[]: RL class 2-A             Quote Post by Taumiel » Mon Mar 29, 2010 2:14 pm A picture's worth a thousand words, so... Another day at class 2-A: Welcoming the new transfer student: Walking back to the apartment: And, finally... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...when some people's OTP comes true: I guess you'll recognize the movie pretty soon... EDIT: the sudents' attire caught my attention, but I think that this film and Evangelion have other things in common. I'll elaborate later, if nobody does so first. (I hope the image links follow the board rules, I have linked them from my own photo...whatever; if that's wrong, please notify me)
